title: oxalis johnstonii
intro: Oxalis johnstonii, also known as the Jamaican sorrel or red sorrel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high concentration of ascorbic acid and anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oxalis johnstonii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as acting as a natural remedy for fever reduction and sore throats. Oxalis johnstonii is typically prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or syrup, and is also used to make a popular drink in many Caribbean countries.
